'''bazongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zebrafish|zebrafish]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-z-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zebrafish|zebrafish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bazongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæzengeth|bæzengeth]] || [[word:bæzengej|bæzengej]] || [[word:bæzengesh|bæzengesh]] || [[word:bæzenge|bæzenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bazozongoth|bazozongoth]] || [[word:bazozongoj|bazozongoj]] || [[word:bazozongosh|bazozongosh]] || [[word:bazozongo|bazozongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bazongoth|bazongoth]] || [[word:bazongoj|bazongoj]] || [[word:bazongosh|bazongosh]] || [[word:bazongo|bazongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bazofngoth|bazofngoth]] || [[word:bazofngoj|bazofngoj]] || [[word:bazofngosh|bazofngosh]] || [[word:bazofngof|bazofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bazongotho|bazongotho]] || [[word:bazongojo|bazongojo]] || [[word:bazongosho|bazongosho]] || [[word:bazongoko|bazongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bazongoth|bazongoth]] || [[word:bazongoj|bazongoj]] || [[word:bazongosh|bazongosh]] || [[word:bazongo|bazongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bazongothol|bazongothol]] || [[word:bazongojol|bazongojol]] || [[word:bazongoshol|bazongoshol]] || [[word:bazongokol|bazongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bazongothotho|bazongothotho]] || [[word:bazongojojo|bazongojojo]] || [[word:bazongoshosho|bazongoshosho]] || [[word:bazongoko|bazongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bazongothon|bazongothon]] || [[word:bazongojon|bazongojon]] || [[word:bazongoshon|bazongoshon]] || [[word:bazongokon|bazongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bazongothoro|bazongothoro]] || [[word:bazongojoro|bazongojoro]] || [[word:bazongoshoro|bazongoshoro]] || [[word:bazongokoro|bazongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
